explanations.1: AuthType Basic tells the server to use the simplest password protection method, where the browser pops up a username/password dialog.
explanations.3: AuthUserFile points to a hidden file (.htpasswd) that stores encrypted usernames and passwords for people allowed to access this folder.
explanations.4: Require valid-user means only people who enter a correct username and password from that .htpasswd file can view the folder's contents.
